completed_tasks.name: Create UI components for plotly visualizations
completed_tasks.notes: Fixed WebView2 violations (TASK-W2-FIX-001). PlotlyControl.xaml and PlotlyControl.xaml.cs now only support static image formats using WinUI 3 Image control. Removed all WebView2 references, InteractiveInfo border, and HTML rendering capabilities. Control properly rejects HTML URLs with clear error messages. Windows-native compliant.

fix_tasks.name: Remove WebView2 and HTML rendering from PlotlyControl
required_changes: Update error messages to explain only static images are supported
Validate URLs to reject HTML formats
Update documentation/comments to remove WebView2 mentions
fix_tasks.notes: All violations removed: Removed InteractiveInfo border from XAML, removed all InteractiveInfo references from code-behind, updated AutomationProperties.HelpText to remove 'interactive', updated error messages to clearly state Windows-native limitation, HTML detection now properly rejects HTML URLs with clear error message. Control now only supports static image formats (PNG, JPEG, etc.) using WinUI 3 Image control. No WebView2 references remain. No linter errors.
